case_title: HRUSOVSKY, MARY vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HRUSOVSKY, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 THROUGH 12 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-26-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-25-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-06-1995

AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON JAN-02-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-26-1995, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON SEP-22-1995 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(C) APPEARANCE ON 6/26/95 WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HRUSOVSKY, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,495.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF
